case_title: WENDY SHIPLEY VS. PARISA ROGHANI ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO FILE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-17-2020 HEARING RE: INTERVENOR REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S MOTION TO FILE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO FILE COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR#5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Atty. VICTOR C. NG, Esq. of Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt, LLP (Tel: 415-278-9400) for defendant Parisa Roghani;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: INTERVENOR REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S Motion To File Complaint In Intervention.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Republic Indemnity Company of America's unopposed motion to file complaint in intervention is granted.

Order signed.
